allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('app.db'\); c.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; rows=c.execute\('SELECT id, title, plan_status, length\(plan_text\) as plen, plan_updated_at, created_at FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(dict\(r\)\) for r in rows]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('app.db'\); c.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; rows=c.execute\('SELECT id, title, plan_status, plan_text FROM projects WHERE plan_status IN \(\\"awaiting_approval\\",\\"generating\\",\\"failed\\"\) ORDER BY plan_updated_at DESC LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\); [print\('---',r['id'],r['title'],r['plan_status'],'---\\n', repr\(r['plan_text']\)[:500]\) for r in rows]")
